description: Sector concentration of open positions (QuantAI paper trading).

panels.description: Share of portfolio notional by sector (|quantity * average_cost|).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN symbol IN ('GLD','IAU','AEM','KGC','AGI','WPM','GOLD','NEM','CDE','SLV','SILJ','PAAS','HL','GDX','GDXJ','RING') THEN 'precious_metals'
    WHEN symbol IN ('URA','URNM') THEN 'uranium'
    WHEN symbol IN ('SCCO','MP') THEN 'industrial_metals'
    WHEN symbol = 'DBC' THEN 'commodities_broad'
    WHEN symbol = 'TLT' THEN 'bonds'
    WHEN symbol IN ('SPY','QQQ','IWM') THEN 'equity_broad'
    WHEN symbol = 'XLK' THEN 'equity_tech'
    WHEN symbol = 'EEM' THEN 'equity_emerging'
    WHEN symbol = 'AAPL' THEN 'equity_single'
    ELSE 'other'
  END AS sector,
  SUM(ABS(quantity * average_cost)) AS notional
FROM positions
WHERE quantity != 0
GROUP BY sector
ORDER BY notional DESC

panels.title: Portfolio Weight by Sector

panels.description: Per-sector breakdown: positions, notional, unrealized P&L.

targets.rawSql:
WITH sectored AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN symbol IN ('GLD','IAU','AEM','KGC','AGI','WPM','GOLD','NEM','CDE','SLV','SILJ','PAAS','HL','GDX','GDXJ','RING') THEN 'precious_metals'
      WHEN symbol IN ('URA','URNM') THEN 'uranium'
      WHEN symbol IN ('SCCO','MP') THEN 'industrial_metals'
      WHEN symbol = 'DBC' THEN 'commodities_broad'
      WHEN symbol = 'TLT' THEN 'bonds'
      WHEN symbol IN ('SPY','QQQ','IWM') THEN 'equity_broad'
      WHEN symbol = 'XLK' THEN 'equity_tech'
      WHEN symbol = 'EEM' THEN 'equity_emerging'
      WHEN symbol = 'AAPL' THEN 'equity_single'
      ELSE 'other'
    END AS sector,
    quantity, average_cost, unrealized_pnl
  FROM positions
  WHERE quantity != 0
),
totals AS (SELECT SUM(ABS(quantity * average_cost)) AS tot FROM sectored)
SELECT
  s.sector,
  COUNT(*) AS positions,
  SUM(ABS(s.quantity * s.average_cost)) AS notional,
  (SUM(ABS(s.quantity * s.average_cost)) / NULLIF((SELECT tot FROM totals), 0) * 100) AS pct_of_book,
  SUM(s.unrealized_pnl) AS unrealized
FROM sectored s
GROUP BY s.sector
ORDER BY notional DESC

panels.title: Sector Breakdown

panels.description: Percent of portfolio in the single largest sector. Red > 50% = concentration risk.

targets.rawSql:
WITH sectored AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN symbol IN ('GLD','IAU','AEM','KGC','AGI','WPM','GOLD','NEM','CDE','SLV','SILJ','PAAS','HL','GDX','GDXJ','RING') THEN 'precious_metals'
      WHEN symbol IN ('URA','URNM') THEN 'uranium'
      WHEN symbol IN ('SCCO','MP') THEN 'industrial_metals'
      WHEN symbol = 'DBC' THEN 'commodities_broad'
      WHEN symbol = 'TLT' THEN 'bonds'
      WHEN symbol IN ('SPY','QQQ','IWM') THEN 'equity_broad'
      WHEN symbol = 'XLK' THEN 'equity_tech'
      WHEN symbol = 'EEM' THEN 'equity_emerging'
      WHEN symbol = 'AAPL' THEN 'equity_single'
      ELSE 'other'
    END AS sector,
    ABS(quantity * average_cost) AS notional
  FROM positions
  WHERE quantity != 0
),
agg AS (SELECT sector, SUM(notional) AS sec_notional FROM sectored GROUP BY sector)
SELECT sector, (sec_notional / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(sec_notional) FROM agg), 0) * 100) AS largest_pct
FROM agg
ORDER BY sec_notional DESC
LIMIT 1
